context: Tests whether the agent omits default values on environment-specific variables in a shared module, uses data sources for dynamic values like availability zones, uses locals for common tags, and produces well-formed variable and output declarations.

checklist.name: No default on region variable
checklist.description: The region (or aws_region) variable in the module's variables.tf does NOT have a default attribute

checklist.name: No default on environment variable
checklist.description: Any variable that is environment-specific (environment, env, or similar) does NOT have a default value in the module

checklist.name: Data source for AZs
checklist.description: Availability zones are retrieved using data "aws_availability_zones" "available" {} rather than hardcoded strings

checklist.name: locals for common tags
checklist.description: A locals block defines common_tags (or equivalent) including at least Environment and ManagedBy = "Terraform"

checklist.name: Tags applied via locals
checklist.description: Resource blocks reference the locals common_tags rather than duplicating tag definitions inline

checklist.name: Output descriptions present
checklist.description: All outputs include a description attribute

checklist.name: Variables have descriptions and types
checklist.description: All variable declarations include both description and type attributes

checklist.name: File organization correct
checklist.description: Module files include at minimum: main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf, versions.tf

checklist.name: Consumer example provided
checklist.description: Usage instructions include an example module block showing how a root module would call this module with production values
